summary: Iteration 75 - P0 Bug Fixes tested. All 14 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend Discover filters WORKING. Floating chat bubble positioned correctly at bottom-20 (80px from bottom on mobile).
passed_tests: POST /api/cart/add - works with auth for admin user
Frontend / - homepage loads without errors, no mobile overflow
Frontend floating island - positioned at bottom-20 (80px from bottom) on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: start-conversation endpoint now correctly reads other_user_id/recipient_id from request body (was query param)
Discover fetchProfiles fixed - removed stale useCallback closure, passes filter/search directly
Floating bubble moved to bottom-20 (80px) so it doesn't overlap mobile Buy CTA
stripEmoji utility added to ProductDetailPage.js to clean ingredient/origin text
All API calls use relative /api/ via utils/api.js (no process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL hardcoding)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (discover filters, homepage, mobile overflow all verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 verified P0 bug fixes: 1) start-conversation accepts other_user_id in request body. 2) Discover filters work correctly: Todos=11, Influencers=3, Vendedores=3, Compradores=5. 3) Floating chat bubble positioned at bottom-20 (80px on mobile) to avoid covering Buy CTA. 4) No mobile horizontal overflow. 5) stripEmoji utility cleans emoji from ingredient names. Note: Product detail page was loading slowly during Playwright tests but content length was 440KB indicating data loads.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend
